title: Narrative Profile — Unit Interpretations
description: Profile overlay schema constraining unit.interpretations for the narrative profile. Applies when profile='narrative'.

pov.description: Point of view type (third_person_limited, first_person, omniscient, etc.).

consciousness_mode.description: Dorrit Cohn consciousness mode (psychonarration, narrated_monologue, quoted_monologue).

psychic_distance.description: Gardner psychic distance level (1–5 or label).

stakes_domain.description: Domain of stakes at risk in this unit (physical, emotional, social, etc.).

canonical_metrics.description: Structured quality metrics for this unit.

motif_tags.description: Motif slugs active in this unit.
